items.title_en: Where things stand with the Department of War
items.title_zh: 与国防部门相关事项的最新进展
items.summary_en: Anthropic published an update on its situation and discussions with the U.S. Department of War, outlining its position and guidance for customers. (Anthropic)
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布公告更新其与美国国防部门相关事项的最新进展，并给出立场说明与对客户的建议。（Anthropic）
